title: Human-in-the-loop: pause-for-user canvas + command consent + awaiting_connector resume

implement.detail: lib/command-shape.mjs (per-script-hash shape + approved store); engine pauseAndAwait (per-pause nonce) wired to 4 pauses: CAPTCHA/MFA fast-path, fixer pause_for_user, awaiting_connector (resume->retry), local_command consent (once/always); server pendingResumes + POST /api/runs/:id/resume (nonce-checked) + SSE keeps stream open on pause; strict same-origin CSRF guard + no wildcard CORS; run-viewer HITL UI (drivable-canvas Continue, consent once/always, connect+resume).

test.detail: automations-consent (4: shape normalize, per-script hash, approve roundtrip) + engine resume (CAPTCHA pause->resume->retry, awaiting_connector resume, consent once/always-persists, headless terminal-pause). 53 automations tests green; typecheck clean.
test.command: npx vitest run tests/automations-consent.test.ts tests/automations-engine.test.ts tests/automations-sse.test.ts

codexReview.detail: R1 (3 high): /resume keyed only by runId -> per-pause NONCE; Origin guard allowed any localhost:port -> STRICT same-origin (host:port==Host); shell consent collapsed to one shape -> per-script sha256 fingerprint. R2: F1/F3 confirmed, F2 SSE still had wildcard ACAO -> removed. No rebuttals.
